sections.paragraph:
ἀτενίζω 1 aor. ἠτένισα (Hippocr. et al.) look intently at, stare at someth. or someone εἴς τι (Polyb. 6, 11, 5; BGU 1816, 25; Lucian, Charon 16; 3 Macc 2:26; TestSol 24:5; TestAbr B 8 p. 112, 19f [Stone p. 72]; TestReub 4:2; JosAs 8:8; 16:7 cod. A; ApcMos 33; Jos., Bell. 5, 517) Ac 1:10; 7:55; 2 Cor 3:7, 13; 1 Cl 7:4; 17:2; 36:2; GJs 3:1; 12:2 (varying w. ἀναστενάζω, cp. de Strycker 298). εἴς τινα (Diog. L. 6, 6, 61; Sext. Emp., Math. 1, 306 Pyrr. 1, 75) Ac 3:4; 6:15; 11:6; 13:9; 1 Cl 9:2; 19:2. πρὸς κυρίου GJs 13:1. W. dat. of pers. (PGM 4, 556; 711; JosAs 8:8) Lk 4:20; 22:56; Ac 3:5 D, 12; 10:4; 14:9; 23:1. Abs. (Herm. Wr. 13, 3) 3:3 D. AcPt Ox 849, 13. Without personal referent, in this instance Paul, AcPl Ox 6, 8f (=Aa I, 241, 13).—FSolmsen, Beiträge z. griech. Wortforschung I 1909, 22.—DELG s.v. τανυ-E. τείνω. M-M. TW. Spicq.

aor. aor. = aorist

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

someth. someth. = something

Polyb Polyb , III–II b.c.—List 5

BGU BGU = Aegyptische Urkunden aus den Museen zu Berlin: Griechische Urkunden—List 4

Lucian Lucian , II a.d.—List 5

Charon Charon , after IV b.c.? b.c.—List 5

TestSol TestSol = Testament of Solomon, I–III a.d.—List 2

TestAbr TestAbr = Testament of Abraham, with some interpolations; I b.c./I a.d.—Lists 2, 5

TestReub TestReub = Testament of Reuben, s. Test12Patr—List 2

JosAs JosAs = Joseph and Aseneth—Lists 2, 5

ApcMos ApcMos = Apocalypse of Moses—List 2

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Strycker Strycker = ÉdeStrycker, s. GJs in List 1

Diog. L. Diog. L. = Diogenes Laertius, III a.d.—List 5

Sext. Emp. Sext. Emp. = Sextus Empiricus, II–III a.d.—List 5

Math Math = mathematician

dat. dat. = dative

pers. pers. = person(s)

PGM PGM = Papyri Graecae Magicae—List 4

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

Herm. Wr. Herm. Wr. = Hermetic Writings—List 5

AcPt Ox 849 AcPt Ox 849 = Acts of Peter, POxy 849—List 1

AcPl Ox 6 AcPl Ox 6 = Acts of Paul, POxy 6—List 1

Aa Aa = Acta apostolorum apocrypha—List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Spicq Spicq = CS., Lexique théologique du Nouveau Testament—Lists 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 148
